Title: Client Workspace Register
Description: Client and partner workspace model, tenant ownership, status, access posture, and handoff state.
Columns: Workspace Model; Ownership Posture; Status; Primary Owner; Tenant Of Record; Access Posture; External Access Approved; Handoff State; Review Date; Workspace Map URL; Notes
Views: Active Workspaces; Handoff Needed; Access Review

Title: Handoff Packet Register
Description: Workspace handoff owner, links, training state, closeout/export path, and next review date.
Columns: Client Or Workspace; Packet Status; Handoff Owner; Training State; Workspace Map URL; Packet Library URL; Closeout Export Path; Next Review Date; Notes
Views: Active Handoffs; Ready For Review; Archived Packets

Title: Tool Permission Review
Description: App grants, agent scopes, risky permissions, workflow owner, and review cadence.
Columns: Permission Area; Current Grant; Risk Level; Owner; Review Status; Review Date; Decision Register Link; Notes

Title: Automation Backlog
Description: Proposed automations before build, use, or client-facing approval.
Columns: Workflow Area; Proposed Value; Risk Level; Approval Status; Owner; Source Surface; Target System; Human Approval Required; Review Date; Notes

Title: Exception Register
Description: Approved deviations with owner, expiry, review date, and closure path.
Columns: Exception Area; Status; Approved By; Expiry Date; Review Date; Decision Register Link; Closure Path; Notes
